phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar um bom restaurante por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OONNG BOHNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih POOR uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao Capitão do barco ou ao Guia de observação. Eles conhecem bem a zona e podem ajudar.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW kuh-pee-TOWN DOO BAH-ruh-koo OHW OW GEEUH DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN. EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh EH PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the boat captain or the birdwatching guide. They know the area well and can help.

responses.english: Ask the boat captain or the birdwatching guide. They know the area well and can help.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW kuh-pee-TOWN DOO BAH-ruh-koo OHW OW GEEUH DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN. EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh EH PAW-dayng uh-zhoo-DAHR.
responses.french: Pergunte ao Capitão do barco ou ao Guia de observação. Eles conhecem bem a zona e podem ajudar.

phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as Salinas de Marim?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH muh-REEN?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Salinas de Marim.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH muh-REEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Marim salt pans.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Marim salt pans.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH muh-REEN.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as Salinas de Marim.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira ou o centro de interpretação?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW AW SAYNGT-roo DIH een-tih-ruhp-reh-tuh-SOWN?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao Centro de Interpretação nas Salinas de Marim. Lá pode obter informações e comprar bilhetes para a visita guiada.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW SAYNGT-roo DIH een-tih-ruhp-reh-tuh-SOWN NUHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH muh-REEN. LAH PAW-dih awb-TEHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH EH koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AH vee-ZEE-tuh GEEAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the Interpretation Center at Salinas de Marim. There you can get information and buy tickets for the guided tour.

responses.english: Go to the Interpretation Center at Salinas de Marim. There you can get information and buy tickets for the guided tour.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW SAYNGT-roo DIH een-tih-ruhp-reh-tuh-SOWN NUHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH muh-REEN. LAH PAW-dih awb-TEHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH EH koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AH vee-ZEE-tuh GEEAH-duh.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao Centro de Interpretação nas Salinas de Marim. Lá pode obter informações e comprar bilhetes para a visita guiada.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Santa Maria lighthouse?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Farol de Santa Maria?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW fuh-RAWL DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals often refer to it as a navigation landmark rather than a tourist spot.

likely_response.local: Pegue o ferry para a Ilha Deserta ou Ilha da Culatra e siga as placas para o Farol de Santa Maria.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEH-gih AW FEH-ree PUH-ruh AH EE-lyuh dih-ZEH-ruh-tuh OHW EE-lyuh DUH koo-LAHT-ruh EH SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Take the ferry to Ilha Deserta or Ilha da Culatra and follow the signs to the Santa Maria lighthouse.

responses.english: Take the ferry to Ilha Deserta or Ilha da Culatra and follow the signs to the Santa Maria lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: PEH-gih AW FEH-ree PUH-ruh AH EE-lyuh dih-ZEH-ruh-tuh OHW EE-lyuh DUH koo-LAHT-ruh EH SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
responses.french: Pegue o ferry para a Ilha Deserta ou Ilha da Culatra e siga as placas para o Farol de Santa Maria.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Santa Maria lighthouse is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Farol de Santa Maria?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW fuh-RAWL DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Lighthouses in the Algarve are maintained by the navy but open for exterior viewing.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Farol de Santa Maria.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Santa Maria lighthouse.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Santa Maria lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DIH SAHNNG-tuh muh-REEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Farol de Santa Maria.

phrases.text_local: Pode indicar a localização das salinas?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DUHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Salt pans are historically significant for regional economy and bird habitats.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Salinas de Marim.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH muh-REEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Salinas de Marim.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Salinas de Marim.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH muh-REEN.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as Salinas de Marim.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso reservar uma visita guiada de observação de aves?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-zih-ruh-VAHR OO-muh vee-ZEE-tuh GEEAH-duh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN DIH AH-vihsh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao Centro de Interpretação e fale com o guia de observação.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW SAYNGT-roo DIH een-tih-ruhp-reh-tuh-SOWN EH FAH-lih KOHM AW GEEUH DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the Interpretation Center and speak with the observation guide.

responses.english: Go to the Interpretation Center and speak with the observation guide.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW SAYNGT-roo DIH een-tih-ruhp-reh-tuh-SOWN EH FAH-lih KOHM AW GEEUH DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao Centro de Interpretação e fale com o guia de observação.
